title: Redecorate
description: A vanilla styled furniture mod | successor to Re:Deco
body:
# Redecorate

a vanilla styled furniture mod

Successor to Re:Deco!


## It all starst with the Carpentry Table! 

All wooden blocks are made using this workbench!
no recipes needed!

With it you can create:

Tables, chairs, benches, lamps and futons!


## **Extensive Customizability**

with 16 fabric colors, 3 bulb types and axe-configured modes,
you can customize to your heart's content!

1,309 possible chair variants
561 possible lamp variants
187 possible futon and bench variants


## **Socials**

Discord and Twitter are @OopsOnlyDelta
(i am most active on discord)
